title: DEMO — Synthetic refactor wave for 8-agent visualization
problem: Fictional plan used by scripts/codex-fleet/demo/ to drive the fleet dashboards with synthetic data. NOT a real piece of work. 12 tasks across 3 dependency waves so the fleet-waves spawn timeline and fleet-plan-tree topo view both have something to render. 8 agents claim and complete tasks on a script; the tick simulator mutates this file in place to advance the animation.

tasks.title: Extract render_pill helper from tab_strip
tasks.description: Pull the duplicated row-0 / row-1 pill loop in fleet-ui/src/tab_strip.rs into a single render_pill(frame, x, y, PillSpec) helper.

tasks.title: Extract Kahn toposort to fleet-data
tasks.description: Move the duplicated waves() function out of fleet-waves and fleet-plan-tree into a shared fleet-data::toposort module.

tasks.title: Extract scrape_activity to fleet-data::scrape
tasks.description: Move scrape_activity + PaneActivity out of fleet.rs into a dedicated scrape.rs module with per-field extractor helpers.

tasks.title: Shared bash helper lib
tasks.description: Pull derive_aid + ios_visible_len + pct_color out of the big scripts into scripts/codex-fleet/lib/.

tasks.title: CliConvention trait in fleet-launcher
tasks.description: Replace the per-CLI match in build_command_line() with a CliConvention trait, one impl per CliKind variant.

tasks.title: Wire fleet-data::toposort into fleet-watcher
tasks.description: Once the toposort module lands, update fleet-watcher to use it instead of its own inlined copy.

tasks.title: Add scrape unit tests for ANSI scrollback
tasks.description: After scrape.rs is extracted, add fixtures covering ANSI escape sequences and multi-line headlines.

tasks.title: Source agents.sh + ui-helpers.sh from full-bringup.sh
tasks.description: Replace the inlined helpers in full-bringup.sh with source statements.

tasks.title: Migrate tab_strip render to use layout module
tasks.description: Move geometry / wrap calculations out of render() into tab_strip/layout.rs now that render_pill is extracted.

tasks.title: Document refactor wave + verify cargo check workspace
tasks.description: Wrap-up task: write the changelog entry and confirm cargo check --workspace is clean across all lanes.

tasks.title: Smoke-test full bringup with refactored scripts
tasks.description: Final gate: run scripts/codex-fleet/full-bringup.sh --n 4 --no-attach to confirm the helper-lib dedup did not regress bringup.
